law: Every git-tracked file MUST have a discoverable synopsis. No opt-out. No bypass env var.

enforcement_layers.name: pre-commit
enforcement_layers.action: auto-inject SYNOPSIS + update index + verify staged co-commit
enforcement_layers.bypass: git commit --no-verify skips this — layers 2-4 still apply

enforcement_layers.name: commit-msg
enforcement_layers.action: block indexable files staged without REPO_FILE_SYNOPSIS_INDEX.json

enforcement_layers.name: pre-push
enforcement_layers.action: verify synopsis + index freshness for all files in push range; index must co-push
enforcement_layers.bypass: NOT skipped by --no-verify — primary backstop for hook bypass

enforcement_layers.name: ci
enforcement_layers.action: full repo --strict verify on every PR/push to main

enforcement_layers.name: builder-api
enforcement_layers.action: auto-inject SYNOPSIS into enforceable file content before GitHub API commit

enforcement_layers.name: npm-prepare
enforcement_layers.action: npm install runs hooks:install → core.hooksPath=githooks (tracked hooks)

in_file_formats.md: <!-- SYNOPSIS: <one line> --> (after YAML frontmatter if present)

ai_lookup_order: 3. In-file SYNOPSIS header at top of source file
